'''竏噐-sh-v-p''' ('''kayashvepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vent|vent]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vent|vent]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏噐-sh-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| kayashvepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyashvepoko|thiyashvepoko]] || [[word:jiyashvepoko|jiyashvepoko]] || [[word:shiyashvepoko|shiyashvepoko]] || [[word:kiyashvepoko|kiyashvepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyashvepoko|thuthuyashvepoko]] || [[word:jujuyashvepoko|jujuyashvepoko]] || [[word:shushuyashvepoko|shushuyashvepoko]] || [[word:kukuyashvepoko|kukuyashvepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyashvepoko|thuyashvepoko]] || [[word:juyashvepoko|juyashvepoko]] || [[word:shuyashvepoko|shuyashvepoko]] || [[word:kuyashvepoko|kuyashvepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyashvepoko|thoyashvepoko]] || [[word:joyashvepoko|joyashvepoko]] || [[word:shoyashvepoko|shoyashvepoko]] || [[word:koyashvepoko|koyashvepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦyashvepoko|thﾃｦyashvepoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦyashvepoko|jﾃｦyashvepoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦyashvepoko|shﾃｦyashvepoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦyashvepoko|kﾃｦyashvepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayashvepoko|thathayashvepoko]] || [[word:jajayashvepoko|jajayashvepoko]] || [[word:shashayashvepoko|shashayashvepoko]] || [[word:kakayashvepoko|kakayashvepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayashvepoko|thayashvepoko]] || [[word:jayashvepoko|jayashvepoko]] || [[word:shayashvepoko|shayashvepoko]] || [[word:kayashvepoko|kayashvepoko]]
|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
